data.title: preplanning scope-split precedence rule not enforced in dispatch protocol (SC6 gap)
data.description: SC6 of epic 28cb-a23a requires preplanning to apply a precedence rule: agent scope-split proposals are only evaluated when preplanning has NOT already split the story. The current dispatch-protocol.md Section 5 processes scope_split_proposals from ui-designer agent without first checking whether the story was already split by preplanning (no splitRole check). preplanning SKILL.md line 385 has a behavioral note but no enforcement gate. Fix: add explicit splitRole guard at start of Section 5 scope-split handling.
